title: Zilpah #2153
definition:
Zilpah = "a trickling"

 1) the Syrian given by Laban to Leah as a handmaid, a concubine of
    Jacob, mother of Asher and Gad
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zilpah = "a trickling"

 1) the Syrian given by Laban to Leah as a handmaid, a concubine of
    Jacob, mother of Asher and Gad

    NASB:  one of Jacobs wives
